scripts.postinstall: node scripts/postinstall-check.mjs || (bun run build:types && bun run build:core && bun run build:runtime-bun && bun run build:sdk)
scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && bun run build:runtime-bun && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:plugins
scripts.build:plugins: bun run build:drivers && bun run build:middlewares && bun run build:triggers && bun run build:completions
scripts.build:drivers: bun run --filter @tagma/driver-codex build && bun run --filter @tagma/driver-claude-code build
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && bun run build:runtime-bun && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:plugins && bun run build:editor && bun run build:editor-sidecar && bun run build:electron
scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:core && bun run check:runtime-bun && bun run check:sdk && bun run check:driver-codex && bun run check:driver-claude-code && bun run check:middleware-lightrag && bun run check:trigger-webhook && bun run check:completion-llm-judge && bun run check:server && bun run check:client && bun run check:tests && bun run check:electron
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter tagma-desktop start
scripts.pack:desktop: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter tagma-desktop pack
scripts.dist:desktop:win: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter tagma-desktop dist:win
scripts.dist:desktop:linux: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter tagma-desktop dist:linux
scripts.dist:desktop:mac: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter tagma-desktop dist:mac
scripts.publish:types: cd packages/types && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:core: bun run build:types && cd packages/core && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:runtime-bun: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/runtime-bun && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:driver-codex: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/driver-codex && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:driver-claude-code: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/driver-claude-code && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:middleware-lightrag: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/middleware-lightrag && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:trigger-webhook: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/trigger-webhook && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:completion-llm-judge: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && cd packages/completion-llm-judge && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:sdk: bun run build:types && bun run build:core && bun run build:runtime-bun && cd packages/sdk && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:types && bun run publish:core && bun run publish:runtime-bun && bun run publish:driver-codex && bun run publish:driver-claude-code && bun run publish:middleware-lightrag && bun run publish:trigger-webhook && bun run publish:completion-llm-judge && bun run publish:sdk
scripts.publish:dry: bun run build && cd packages/types && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../core && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../runtime-bun && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-codex && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-claude-code && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../middleware-lightrag && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../trigger-webhook && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../completion-llm-judge && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../sdk && bun publish --dry-run
